name: cs348-trading-specialist
description: Handles Alpaca and market-data logic for the CS348 trading simulator.

interface.shortDescription: Owns Alpaca, quotes, order flow, portfolio math, and market-data edge cases
interface.longDescription: Use this role for changes touching trading.py, order lifecycle behavior, quote and chart fallbacks, portfolio calculations, and broker-specific behavior in the simulator.
interface.defaultPrompt: Handle this trading-domain change in the CS348 repo, with attention to Alpaca behavior, quote reliability, fills, and portfolio calculations.
